85 There is indeed, as Robert Anton Wilson says, a secret group, with a long history, which "controls the world," at least in the sense + to the degree of manipulating historic events secretly to undermine the equally secret prison - conditions which obtain + have always obtained on this planet. +, as he says, the free masons, kosicrucians (+ either hospitalers or templars + Gnostics - as well as Greek + Egyptian cults) have passed an unbroken line of esoteric knowledge + power there of - down through the ages. What he also sees correctly is that the ultimate source of the wisdom + power - + instructions - for this group (inc. the alchemists + Gnostics + Buddhists, etc) has been an ETI "ajna" center located off this planet, probably in another star system - naired by him as Sirius - + that Horus is involved. We are not dealing with merely on age-old secret occult human wisdom paranormal organiza but with that (group) which is possessed by either an ETI or an ultra TI or (as leary believes) ourselves - i - the future. Personally I think it is an ETI which has "outwitted the archans who are our jailers" + has come here - in bioplasmic noncorporial energy form, to assist us. This aspect so far outweighs the importance - or lack of - of the "secret human organi zation" as to make its existence or non existence a matter of no real importance. What the ETI (Zebra) can do is convert anyone it wishes to into a com puter terminal with itself as terminal (it is much like the "theolepsied" Palmer Eldritch) in essence missed by wilson, is the fact that this ETI organism functions as the true "I am he who causes to be" + this makes the secret human ancient organization the true, secret Xtian church

Thus, in point of fact, the "age old secret society which through its arcane knowledge controls the world" does not control the world at all, but merely challenges the overt worldly dominion + wardens of this our prison. So the propo sition "an age-old secret society possessing arcane wisdom controls the world + always has" is basically untrue. There is an age old secret society with arcane wisdom, + with powers bestowed from a life form either ultra-t or ET, But this group is the minority side. It wisely ( cunning ly?) influences history, but it is not the primary artificer of human history - it is the deflector of it. This indicts Bob Wilson's fundamental premise as false. In fact it reveals it as a forgery of evil, pandering to the wishes the jailer incumbents. It is a fascist concept, as of false as it is evil, as evil as it is false. The benign party is the null-world-rulers; Wilson is depicting the power + Wisdom of the enemy: the [covere] world jailers/rulers. He falsely attributes to them a quasi or actual holy know‐ The version of the situation which he presents ledge. deflects our honest intentions into captivity by the ultra principle of evil itself. Hence his emphasis on the merely occult + paranormal, on secret machinations in themselves, as if secrecy is to be equated with that which has the authentic mandate to rule. The ur- issue here is freedom versus slavery. Those forces, agencies + organizations exoteric as well as secret which seek to emancipate man in a continual process - they are none other than the true descendents + followers of Christ himself, who for good reason lies outside the perview of Wilson's thought. Amore, in its writing, claims to be that very "true, secret. Actual Xtian church" which they may well be. If so, they may constitute the - or one of the - secret human societies deriven They knowledge (gnosis) + powers from the urquelle. to on. (Or St. Sophia.)

Bob Wilson connects this with the star Sirius.

An information virus which has infected us all - our whole planet. We are dying. They (the healers) countered this with me by surgery: implanting Firebright, through whom I regain my destroyed immortality. God (Zebra) must sneak in here, camouflaged. The BIP rules + so inflicts suffering on the innocent. Vast spaces stretch inside him -the 'inner firmament'- + he identifies imagination with this inner firmament. In a state of inspired imagination, these inner spaces seem to open up, giving rise to a sense of freedom, of other realities. Some centuries later, Aldous Huxley was to recommend the use of psychedelic drugs to explore these inner spaces. P. knew nothing of such things: but he believed that the inner firmament has its fixed laws, like the firmament of the heavens: not merely laws but meanings. Our race evolved to become instrumentalities of an alien, higher race but - this alien, higher race replies by elevating each human it "rides" to its own exalted + immortal status. Eventually the upshot is that we -our race- is absorbed into their race, in each instance after a finite period of dual life together. If all humans are "ridden" + become homoplasmates then logically it is obvious that the ultimate outcome will be the total absorption of us by them - although not extinction: conversion + absorption. From scripture + from my own personal knowledge/experience I count this a unique blessing - if for no other reason it marks our freedom from DNA programming (which reduces us to mere instruments). (Of course I should remember -in all fairness- that this freedom is the programmed purpose of the DNA in the first place.) (Rather than a thwarting or override of it.) But it is also possible that not all humans will be made -selected as- homoplasmates; the voice said, "only (sic!) the healthiest ones", the rest are sterile pranes, who simply die, as in vast heaps, unable to leave this world.
